releases.name: Law Lookup for Germany + Austria + Switzerland 0.2.2

releases.author: GammaFunds
releases.description:
This maintenance release resolves the community-plugin manifest review for version 0.2.0.

## Fixed

- Removed the redundant platform name from the plugin description.
- Kept the plugin name, supported jurisdictions, runtime behavior, and legal-source coverage unchanged.

## Verification

- No TypeScript source files changed in this release.
- All 401 automated tests pass.
- The production build remains reproducible.
- `main.js` and `styles.css` are byte-identical to version 0.2.0.

This plugin is a research and productivity tool, not legal advice. Verify legal text, version, applicability, and source status against the relevant official publication before relying on it.
releases.name: Law Lookup for Germany + Austria + Switzerland 0.2.1

releases.author: GammaFunds
releases.description:
This release expands the plugin from German federal-law lookup to curated legal-reference lookup across Germany, Austria, and Switzerland, together with a multilingual GDPR/DSGVO article-lookup pilot.

## Highlights

- Look up selected German federal laws through Gesetze im Internet.
- Look up exactly 24 explicitly mapped Austrian federal laws through RIS.
- Look up article references for 23 explicitly mapped Swiss federal laws through Fedlex.
- Retrieve GDPR/DSGVO articles in all 24 official EU languages.
- Preview legal text and source information before explicitly inserting it into the active note.
- Keep jurisdiction and language variants isolated in the local cache.
- Use German or English plugin UI labels according to the active Obsidian locale.

## Privacy and safety

- Network requests occur only after a user starts a lookup.
- Note contents are not sent to legal-information providers.
- The plugin does not use AI services and never generates translations.
- Legal text is inserted only after an explicit user action.

## Current limitations

EU support remains limited to GDPR/DSGVO articles. Generic CELEX lookup, arbitrary EU acts, consolidated versions, recitals, annexes, corrigenda, and the AI Act are not included. Swiss cantonal law and general Austrian English translations are also outside the current scope.

This plugin is a research and productivity tool, not legal advice. Verify legal text, version, applicability, and source status against the relevant official publication before relying on it.
releases.name: Law Lookup for Germany + Austria + Switzerland 0.2.0

releases.author: GammaFunds
releases.description:
## German Law Lookup 0.1.4

Community review recommendation cleanup release.

### Changes

- Removes the unused `createFetchLawProviderTransport` helper.
- Removes stale provider imports left over after the 0.1.3 transport cleanup.

### Validation

- `npm test`: 149 passing, 0 failing.
- `npm run build`: successful.

### Runtime behavior

No parser, cache, lookup, provider priority, or insertion behavior changes.
releases.name: German Law Lookup 0.1.4

releases.author: GammaFunds
releases.description:
## German Law Lookup 0.1.3

Community review warning cleanup release.

### Changes

- Removes the `builtin-modules` dev dependency and uses Node's built-in module list from `node:module`.
- Removes the direct `fetch` fallback from the provider HTTP transport abstraction.
- Adds a non-networking fallback transport for provider composition when no runtime HTTP transport is configured.
- Marks async UI event handlers explicitly to satisfy promise-handling checks.

### Validation

- `npm test`: 149 passing, 0 failing.
- `npm run build`: successful.

### Runtime behavior

No parser, cache, lookup, provider priority, or insertion behavior changes.
releases.name: German Law Lookup 0.1.3

releases.author: GammaFunds
releases.description:
## German Law Lookup 0.1.2

Community review scanner fix release.

### Changes

- Removes the word “Obsidian” from the plugin manifest description.
- Uses the Obsidian `Setting#setHeading()` API for settings headings.
- Removes use of `getLanguage()` to keep compatibility with the declared minimum app version.
- Keeps `minAppVersion` at `1.8.0`.

### Runtime behavior

No parser, provider, cache, lookup, or insertion behavior changes.
releases.name: German Law Lookup 0.1.2

releases.author: GammaFunds
releases.description:
## German Law Lookup 0.1.1 beta

Patch beta release.

### Changes

- Adds release author metadata to `manifest.json` and `package.json`.
- Keeps plugin id `german-law-lookup`.
- Keeps Obsidian minimum app version at `1.8.0`.

### Runtime changes

No runtime behavior changes. Parser runtime, provider logic, cache behavior, UI, and insertion behavior are unchanged.

### Installation

Download `main.js`, `manifest.json`, and `styles.css` and place them in:

```text
<your-vault>/.obsidian/plugins/german-law-lookup/
```

Then reload Obsidian and enable the plugin.
releases.name: German Law Lookup 0.1.1 beta

releases.author: GammaFunds
releases.description:
## German Law Lookup 0.1.0 beta

Initial beta release.

### Features

- Look up supported German federal law references in Obsidian.
- Preview retrieved law text before insertion.
- Insert formatted law text into the active note after explicit user action.
- Use official German law text by default.
- Optionally use published English law text where explicitly configured.
- Fall back to German official text when English law text is unavailable.
- Include source and retrieval metadata when enabled.

### Limitations

- German federal law only.
- No state law, EU law, case law, legal commentary, or legal advice.
- No generated translations.

### Installation

Download the attached `main.js`, `manifest.json`, and `styles.css` files and place them in:

```text
<your-vault>/.obsidian/plugins/german-law-lookup/
```

Then reload Obsidian and enable the plugin.
releases.name: German Law Lookup 0.1.0 beta
